sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n55045" key="katarroh/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καταρροή</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n55045.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">flowing down, defluxion</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0096.tlg002:145" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesop.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">145</biblScope> </bibl> Chambry.</sense> </entryFree>
